metadata.description: Single-plugin marketplace exposing the cc-enslaver discipline plugin.

plugins.name: cc-enslaver
plugins.description: A Claude Code plugin and LLM-agnostic rule pack that enforces systematic thinking, verified citations, and root-cause analysis — eliminating reactive, lazy AI behavior. v0.10 adds Step 0 = build feedback loop to systematic-debug (10 concrete loop construction patterns from mattpocock-skills:diagnose, with mandatory checkpoint before hypothesis-generation).
